name: @agentforge/plugin-example
description: Demonstrates all AgentForge v5 plugin capabilities: custom agents, dashboard sections, webhooks, CLI commands, and API routes.

agents.name: example-analyzer
agents.description: Analyzes session outcomes and generates improvement suggestions

dashboardSections.title: Session Insights
dashboardSections.description: Visual breakdown of session success rates, cost trends, and agent performance

webhooks.description: Sends session completion/failure data to an external endpoint (e.g., Slack, PagerDuty)
Sends cost anomaly alerts to a configured endpoint

args.name: format
args.description: Output format: json, markdown, or csv

args.name: days
args.description: Number of days to include in the report

commands.name: example-health
commands.description: Run a system health check and report status

apiRoutes.description: Get AI-generated insights from recent sessions
Trigger analysis of a specific session or date range

webhookUrl.description: Default webhook endpoint URL for notifications

analysisDepth.description: Number of recent sessions to include in analysis

costAlertThreshold.description: Cost threshold (USD) that triggers an alert
